LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT BEAVEX, INC.'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE CROSS-COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. CROSS-DEFENDANT WAS ONLY RECENTLY IDENTIFIED, AND COURTS ARE TO LIBERALLY PERMIT FILING OF CROSS-COMPLAINTS TO ALLOW COMPLETE DETERMINATION OF A CONTROVERSY IN ONE ACTION. (CURRIE MEDICAL SPECIALTIES, INC. V. BOWEN (1982) 136 CAL.APP.3D 774, 777.) WRITTEN ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: RICHARD ULMER; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: REYES HUNTER, CSR #6576, BUS. TEL: 530-339-5023. (D302)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-14-2017 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-12-2016 Continued To Apr-03-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-22-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, James J. Patrick of RYAN & LIFTER (925-884-2080) appearas for defendant/moving party

No other appearances is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BEAVEX, INC.'S Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint is GRANTED. Cross-defendant was only recently identified, and courts are to liberally permit filing of cross-complaints to allow complete determination of a controversy in one action. (Currie Medical Specialties, Inc. v. Bowen (1982) 136 Cal.App.3d 774, 777.) Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, Bus. Tel: 530-339-5023. (D302)
